'''鈭歠-f-f-b''' ('''kafaffeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuk|yuk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuk|yuk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-f-f-b
|-
! Lemma
| kafaffeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifafeboko|thifafeboko]] || [[word:jifafeboko|jifafeboko]] || [[word:shifafeboko|shifafeboko]] || [[word:kifafeboko|kifafeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fafeboko|th忙fafeboko]] || [[word:j忙fafeboko|j忙fafeboko]] || [[word:sh忙fafeboko|sh忙fafeboko]] || [[word:k忙fafeboko|k忙fafeboko]]
|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
